evidence: Largest rejection class is publication_shape_nonfiction (54.5%), which is a legitimate non-narrative boundary.
Earlier replay identified only one plausible false reject among publication-identity rejects.
Single-rule relaxations produced unacceptable false-accept risk.
Strict shadow-mode counterfactual admitted zero candidates.
Downstream impact remained zero: selected additions 0, replacements 0, score delta 0, diversity delta 0.

opportunities.opportunity: Teen Google Books fallback dependence reduction
opportunities.evidence: Production A/B improved acceptedAfterSourcePolicy (+8) and scored (+8), but fallback usage stayed unchanged and selected delta was only +1.

opportunities.opportunity: Teen Open Library recall freeze/starvation boundary (mechanism-classified)
opportunities.evidence: Recurring freeze/starvation symptoms remain. Next pass must classify starvation by mechanism (transport/proxy timeout, empty upstream, normalization collapse, publication filtering, diversity exhaustion, underfill after scoring, other).

opportunities.opportunity: Google Books family-specific query refinement framework (generalized production A/B harness)
opportunities.evidence: Science-fiction case proved query variants can improve upstream counts while downstream gains may dissipate. A reusable family->variants->production A/B->promote/reject loop is now higher leverage than one-off tuning.

opportunities.opportunity: Open Library recall yield analysis by route and age band
opportunities.evidence: Need route-normalized recall diagnostics (e.g., Teen Fantasy, Teen Mystery, Teen Horror, Teen Contemporary, Adult Historical, Adult Mixed Speculative) to identify dominant loss boundaries precisely.

opportunities.opportunity: Kids Google Books pre-scoring rejection boundary
opportunities.evidence: Prior Kids diagnostics flagged measurable pre-scoring rejection boundaries worth targeted recall-quality investigation after P1 lanes.
Potential attrition boundary, but current evidence remains weaker than recall/fallback bottlenecks.
Instrumentation is present; collect production incidence and downstream impact before policy changes.

opportunities.opportunity: Pre-Teen Google Books publication-shape rescue effectiveness
opportunities.evidence: Rescue path exists; continue drift monitoring for false-accept pressure and sustained slate benefit.
Lower leverage until upstream recall and starvation mechanisms are improved.
Investigation complete; strict counterfactual admitted zero candidates and produced no downstream improvement.
